title: Full code-review remediation per PANTHEON_BASE_CODE_REVIEW_CHECKLIST
goal: Scan the codebase against docs/PANTHEON_BASE_CODE_REVIEW_CHECKLIST.md across all thirteen dimensions, auto-fix every mechanically safe finding (security hardening, i18n key compliance, UI token compliance, DB indexes, error swallowing), and implement the three user-approved decision items (i18n unique index migration, session-revocation refresh-token cascade, private-datasource default-deny).

in: refresh token rotation and session-revocation cascade delete (authtoken sessref reverse index, all four revoke paths)
SecureActionMiddleware on high-risk routes: user delete/reset-password, role delete, menu delete, admin session revoke
CSP single-source (remove duplicate header from SecurityHeadersMiddleware), CSRF exempt exact-match
CSV formula-injection neutralization, import size/row caps, batch-operation cap (MaxBatchIDs=1000)
upload magic-bytes sniffing for image extensions, serve endpoint nosniff + attachment for non-image
dynamic module lifecycle: reject unregistered module names, nested-module permission prefix fix, role_menu orphan cleanup, business-only source purge
generator: env guard on preview/download, datasource private-host default-deny with PANTHEON_GENERATOR_DATASOURCE_ALLOW_PRIVATE opt-in
i18n: 88 hardcoded audit titles to keys, 111 new zh/en resource pairs, system:role:import permission seed
silent error swallowing replaced with logged warnings/errors in auth settings, throttle, login-log, security-event, audit-cleanup paths
builtin admin magic values centralized in pkg/common/builtin.go
migrations 000009 (tree/junction indexes) and 000010 (i18n locale+key unique with dedupe)
UI token compliance: 4 hardcoded colors to Pantheon tokens; upload/import request timeouts
out: search-toolbar feature work present in the same working tree (kept unstaged, separate branch/PR)
boundary-gate CI blocking, MFA production baseline, coverage ratchet (deferred per fix-report roadmap)

taskDoc: fix-report.md — full finding list, verification matrix, and remaining roadmap

modify: backend/internal/middleware/*.go (security headers, csrf, body-limit, rate-limit messages)
backend/modules/lowcode/** (lifecycle guards, datasource policy, audit metadata)
backend/modules/system/** (audit titles, seeds, secure-action routes, upload serve)

humanGates: user directed full-review-and-autofix via /goal with explicit edit authorization
user approved the three decision items (i18n unique index, refresh cascade, private-host default-deny) and delegated best-practice implementation
user chose commit scope: review remediation only, search-toolbar work stays uncommitted
